data.title: Former CFO receives 2-year sentence for diverting $35M to crypto project in 2022, using funds for DeFi investments.
data.description: A man named Nevin Shetty has been found guilty of wire fraud in connection to unlawfully transferring a total of $35 million from a startup based in Seattle to his personal cryptocurrency platform in the year 2022, with the intention of investing in DeFi projects.

data.title: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis considers state stablecoin rules after Senate approval.
data.description: In a recent update on the current situation, it has been reported that the number of confirmed COVID-19 cases has reached over 5 million globally. The death toll has also risen to over 300,000 worldwide. These numbers highlight the severe impact the virus continues to have on countries around the world. In addition to the health crisis, the global economy has been significantly impacted, with millions of people facing unemployment and financial struggles. Governments and health organizations are working tirelessly to slow the spread of the virus and provide support to those in need. The situation remains fluid, and it is essential for individuals to follow guidelines to protect themselves and others.

data.title: NEW YORK BUS WORKERS JOIN TEAMSTERS
data.description: More than 90 employees at Durham School Services in Watervliet, New York, recently voted affirmatively for representation by Teamsters, joining Local 294. The workers' decision to unionize reflects a growing trend towards collective bargaining.

data.title: Redwood Trust Announces Closing of Aspire's Inaugural Non-QM Securitization
data.description: In Mill Valley, California, Redwood Trust, Inc. revealed the completion of SPIRE 2026-1, the first non-qualified mortgage ("non-QM") securitization by Aspire, Redwood's non-QM mortgage banking platform. This $391 million deal signifies a significant step forward in Aspire's mission to broaden its funding channels and enhance its capital markets platform. Redwood Trust, a key player in promoting housing opportunities for both homebuyers and renters, is identified on the NYSE as RWT.

data.title: ORIC Pharmaceuticals Reports Inducement Grants under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: On March 2, 2026, ORIC Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: ORIC), based in South San Francisco, California and San Diego, disclosed granting 14,800 non-qualified stock options and 2,400 restricted stock units to a new non-executive employee who joined the company in February 2026. ORIC is a clinical stage oncology company dedicated to developing therapies addressing mechanisms of therapeutic resistance.

data.title: Fulcrum Therapeutics Reports Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: Fulcrum Therapeutics, Inc. based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, disclosed on March 6, 2026, that they provided non-statutory stock options to a single new employee. The company, listed as Nasdaq: FULC, is dedicated to advancing small molecules for enhancing the quality of life for individuals with rare genetic conditions. These stock options were awarded in line with the 2022 Inducement Stock Incentive Plan, as revised, as a crucial inducement for the new employee to join Fulcrum. This action adheres to Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: Aptorum Group Limited Announces Receipt of Nasdaq Notification Regarding Minimum Bid Price Deficiency
data.description: Recently in Hong Kong, on March 6, 2026, Aptorum Group Limited, a prominent Biotechnology company listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol APM, revealed that they were notified by the Nasdaq Stock Market LLC on March 5, 2026. The notification highlighted their non-compliance with the minimum bid price stipulation of $1 per share, in accordance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2).
Centcom: hit over 3,000 targets in Iran

data.title: Gold Reserve Notes Issuance of OFAC General License 51 Related to Venezuelan-Origin Gold
data.description: Gold Reserve Ltd. acknowledged the issuance of General License 51 by the U.S. Department of the Treasury’s OFAC. This license allows specific transactions related to Venezuelan-origin gold under outlined conditions. Referred to as GL 51, it permits transactions essential for the exportation, sale, supply, storage, purchase, and delivery of this gold. Gold Reserve is identified by various stock codes including TSX-V: GRZ, BSX: GRZ.BH, OTCQX: GDRZF. This will facilitate certain dealings within the specified parameters.

data.title: TC Transcontinental completes sale of its Packaging Business to ProAmpac Holdings Inc.
data.description: Montreal, 6th March 2026—In recent news, Transcontinental Inc. (TSX: TCL.A TCL.B) has finalized the sale of its Packaging Business to ProAmpac Holdings Inc., with the deal amounting to $2.1 billion in cash proceeds. The Corporation, commonly known as TC Transcontinental, confirmed the completion of this transaction.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Drops 400 Points As Oil Prices Soar; Costco Climbs, Fertilizer Names Spike (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a significant drop of 400 points due to the sharp increase in oil prices. Additionally, a prominent retail company saw a drastic decline in its stock value. This news comes amidst live coverage highlighting the stock market's volatility, with Costco showing gains and fertilizer companies experiencing a spike in their stock prices.

data.title: NI Holdings, Inc. Reports Results for Fourth Quarter and Year Ended December 31, 2025
data.description: In Fargo, North Dakota, on March 06, 2026, NI Holdings, Inc. revealed its financial outcomes for the year concluding on December 31, 2025. The Company, identified as NI Holdings and traded on NASDAQ under the symbol NODK, provided an update on its performance.

data.title: Crescent Biopharma Announces Grants of Inducement Awards
data.description: In WALTHAM, Massachusetts, on March 06, 2026, Crescent Biopharma, Inc. ("Crescent" or "the Company") (Nasdaq: CBIO), a clinical-stage biotech firm focused on advancing cancer treatments, disclosed that the independent Compensation Committee of its Board of Directors sanctioned the allocation of options allowing the purchase of a total of 45,675 shares of the Company's ordinary stock to two non-executive staff members as equity inducement prizes under the Crescent Biopharma, Inc. 2025 Employment Inducement Incentive Award Plan, recently updated (the "Inducement Plan"). Ratified on March 5, 2026, these options played a vital role in both employees' decision to join Crescent, complying with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: RBI Recommends Shareholders Reject NYSB's "Mini-tender Offer"
data.description: Restaurant Brands International Inc. has recently received an unsolicited mini-tender offer from New York Stock and Bond LLC to acquire approximately 0.03% of the company's shares, amounting to 100,000 RBI common shares. This offer has been made to RBI, traded under the symbols NYSE: QSR and TSX: QSR.
